title: Protocol package: types, Zod schemas, ID generation
description: Build @sisu/protocol with all core interfaces (ExternalRef, WorkItem, RoleDefinition, CapabilityDefinition, WorkflowTemplate, ExecutionPlan, AgentMail, RuntimeLease, AdapterRegistration), Zod schemas for runtime validation, ID generators (wrk/plan/mail/run/lease_{ulid}), version constant, barrel exports. TypeScript strict, zero any. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 1.
closeReason: Implemented @sisu/protocol package: 9 core interfaces (WorkItem, RoleDefinition, CapabilityDefinition, WorkflowTemplate, ExecutionPlan, AgentMail, RuntimeLease, AdapterRegistration, ExternalRef), 12 Zod validation schemas, 5 ULID-based ID generators, version constant, barrel exports. 58 tests, 100% runtime coverage. All quality gates pass.

title: Core package: storage interface, SQLite, roles, lifecycle
description: Build @sisu/core with: (1) SisuStorage interface (work items, plans, mail, leases, roles, workflows CRUD), (2) SQLite implementation via better-sqlite3 with optimistic versioning, JSON columns, parameterized queries, (3) Role registry loading 9 built-in roles with canSpawn enforcement, (4) Work item lifecycle state machine with valid transition validation. Depends on @sisu/protocol. 90%+ test coverage. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 2.

title: Templates: 9 role definitions + 5 workflow templates
description: Build @sisu/templates-default with: (1) 9 role markdown templates (orchestrator, coordinator, supervisor, scout, builder, reviewer, lead, merger, monitor) each with description, responsibilities, can/cannot do, default model tier, (2) 5 workflow YAML templates (simple-task, build-review, scout-build-review, multi-stream-feature, rework-loop), (3) Package.json and tsconfig. Roles must define correct tiers, access levels, canSpawn arrays, modelPreference per SPEC.md. See .overstory/specs/phase-1-protocol-and-storage.md section 3.

title: Infrastructure: pnpm workspace, package configs, CI plumbing
description: Ensure all packages have proper package.json (with build/lint/typecheck/test scripts), tsconfig.json (extending base), vitest configs. pnpm install must work, pnpm lint (biome) must pass, pnpm typecheck (tsc --noEmit) must pass, pnpm test (vitest) must pass. Wire up cross-package dependencies. This is the glue that makes Phase 1 a working monorepo.
closeReason: pnpm workspace wired: pnpm install works from root, biome.json migrated to v2.4.6, protocol package has complete package.json/tsconfig.json/vitest.config.ts.
